name: Car Move Game
description: Welcome to Car Move Game, a fun and addictive car puzzle adventure where you must move vehicles carefully and clear the path to win! Enjoy a relaxing yet challenging gameplay experience that tests your brain and improves your problem-solving skills. In this exciting car moving puzzle game, your mission is simple: slide cars, unblock traffic, and complete each level with smart moves. Every stage becomes more interesting as the difficulty increases, making it perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers. With smooth controls, colorful graphics, and engaging levels, Car Move Game is the best choice for players who enjoy car parking challenges,
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
